What Reif Automation Builds

Automations That Pay
For Themselves

Every workflow we build solves a real, daily problem — and delivers measurable ROI from day one.

⚡

AI Lead Response

The moment a lead fills out your contact form, our AI writes and sends a personalized response — day or night. No more leads going cold overnight.

Instant response
📅

Appointment Booking & Reminders

Automated confirmation emails and AI-written reminders sent at intervals you choose — whether that's 48 hours, 24 hours, or 2 hours before. Dramatically fewer no-shows, zero manual effort.

Reduces no-shows 80%
🔄

Follow Up & Re-engagement

Automatic follow-up sequences for leads who haven't responded and post-appointment check-ins that turn one-time customers into regulars.

Recover lost leads
⭐

Review Request Automation

After every appointment, automatically send a personalized review request. Build your Google reputation on autopilot without lifting a finger.

More 5-star reviews
📵

Cancellation Handler

When a client cancels, instantly send an empathetic email and invite them to rebook — automatically recovering revenue you'd otherwise lose.

Recover cancellations
🤖

AI Website Chatbot

A 24/7 AI assistant on your website that answers questions, qualifies leads, and books appointments — even while you sleep.

24/7 availability
Powered by Reif Automation Built for small businesses that want to grow

The Reif Automation Process

Up and Running
in Days, Not Months

We handle the entire setup. You just tell us about your business and we take it from there.

1

Discovery Call

We learn about your business, your biggest pain points, and which automations will have the highest impact for you.

2

We Build It

Reif Automation builds and tests your custom workflow system — tailored to your brand voice, tools, and business processes.

3

Go Live

We connect everything to your existing tools and flip it on. Most clients are fully live within 3–5 business days.

4

We Maintain It

Monthly reporting, ongoing optimization, and dedicated support — so your automations keep performing month after month.
